reasoning: The Polymarket odds were 3% on Oct 16, 2025, which provides a strong baseline. RFK Jr. had previously telegraphed that he would provide answers on the cause of autism by September. With his highly-anticipated September deadline already passed without a qualifying "definitive cause" announcement, and only five days remaining between the knowledge cutoff (Oct 26) and the resolution date (Oct 31), the chances of a sudden, qualifying announcement are extremely remote. I am updating my forecast down to the minimum 2% permitted.
